name: What do I do right now if my business in LA got bad advice from Google AI Overview on a contract?
description: Stop using AI, document error, consult CA lawyer immediately to fix contract and limit harm.[3]

mainEntity.name: What do I do right now if my business in LA got bad advice from Google AI Overview on a contract?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stop using AI, document error, consult CA lawyer immediately to fix contract and limit harm.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Immediately stop relying on the AI advice, document the prompt/output/error, and consult a licensed California attorney to review and correct the contract. AI lacks privilege protection and can hallucinate inaccurate legal analysis, risking enforceability issues similar to NY rulings on AI unreliability.[3] Key factors: assess if the bad advice caused financial loss or liability exposure; preserve AI chat logs as evidence. Time-sensitive: contracts may have short cure periods. Get professional legal review to mitigate damages before disputes arise.
